heading: Tonight
text: A stray evening shower, then becoming mostly clear. A few high clouds north before morning. Lows in the low to mid 40s, a few upper 30s in the cold mountain valleys, with isolated frost. Winds diminishing to light and variable.

heading: Tuesday
text: High clouds spread south then clearing, becoming mostly sunny, partly clouds from the green mountains east. Warmer, highs in the mid 60s to low 70s. North winds over 10mph in the Champlain valley

heading: Tuesday Night
text: Becoming mostly clear after midnight. Lows in the 40s, ranging from 40 in the cool spots to near 50 along Lake Champlain. Northwest winds diminishing to light and variable.
